pi_items.source: Verified across task.json (line 17), task description, setup_task.sh (line 9), export_result.sh (line 6), and verifier.py line 28

Task description specifies 7 layers including 'LEDGER' (line 2 of specifications: 'Ledger Board: Draw the top edge (Y=192) as a double or thick line. Layer: LEDGER'). Metadata only includes 6 layers, missing LEDGER. Verifier.py line 62 does not include LEDGER.
Verified in task description (Specification 1: '144 units wide (X)') and verifier.py line 82 ('Width: 144 expected')
Verified in task description (Specification 1: '192 units long (Y)') and verifier.py line 83 ('Height: 192 deck + 48 stairs = 240')
Verified in task description (Specification 4: 'spaced 16 units on-center starting from X=0') and verifier.py line 95 ('# 144 / 16 = 9 spaces -> ~10 lines')

privileged_info_summary: The deck framing plan task is a synthetic CAD design task that asks users to create a drawing in LibreCAD. The task specifies a residential deck 144 units wide by 192 units long (dimensions in inches) with joists spaced 16 units on-center. The output should be saved as deck_framing_plan.dxf. The task description specifies 7 required layers (OUTLINE, LEDGER, JOISTS, BEAM, POSTS, STAIRS, DIMENSIONS), but the metadata only lists 6 layers, omitting the LEDGER layer which represents the ledger board at the deck's top edge. All dimensional specifications are consistent across the task description and verifier logic.
